recommendations.title: Rogue Trader
recommendations.overview: Rogue Trader tells the true story of Nick Leeson, an employee of Barings Bank who--after a successful trading run--ends up accumulating $1.4 billion in losses hidden in account #88888.

recommendations.title: Foolish Wives
recommendations.overview: A con artist masquerades as Russian nobility and attempts to seduce the wife of an American diplomat.

recommendations.title: Love in the Time of Cholera
recommendations.overview: In Colombia just after the Great War, an old man falls from a ladder; dying, he professes great love for his wife. After the funeral, a man calls on the widow - she dismisses him angrily. Flash back more than 50 years to the day Florentino Ariza, a t

recommendations.title: Code Name: Emperor
recommendations.overview: Juan, a secret service agent, approaches Wendy, a young Filipina who works as a maid for a suspicious couple.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: The Protector 2
recommendations.overview: Kham finds himself in trouble when he is accused of killing a trader. While on the run from the trader's nieces who are martial artists, Kham meets a friend who warns him of a terrorist plot.

recommendations.title: Terminal Velocity
recommendations.overview: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.

recommendations.title: Carne
recommendations.overview: A woman who works in a meat packing plant is continuously preyed upon by lecherous men.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.
